creator: ler@FreeBSD.org
text:
I've had to have my Colo provider power cycle my HP DL360G5 box twice now on kernel changes for 11.1-BETA. 

It just hangs after printing the CD0 identity line. 

the latest occurrence was on the reboot to:
FreeBSD thebighonker.lerctr.org 11.1-BETA2 FreeBSD 11.1-BETA2 #14 r320190: Wed Jun 21 12:10:01 CDT 2017     root@thebighonker.lerctr.org:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64

after a power cycle it comes up, but this is annoying. 

It's been fine on 11.0 for a long time. 

I'm not sure what else I can get for you, as I'm remote from the box.
